# Orange County Felony Lawyer

> Official website of ALL Trial Lawyers — Orange County felony defense practice led by founding attorney Mohammad "Mo" Abuershaid, a former Orange County Public Defender and 7x Super Lawyers honoree.

ALL Trial Lawyers provides felony defense representation at all four Orange County Superior Court justice centers: Central Justice Center (Santa Ana), Harbor Justice Center (Newport Beach), North Justice Center (Fullerton), and West Justice Center (Westminster). The firm also represents clients in federal cases in the United States District Court for the Central District of California.

Contact: (866) 811-4255 — free consultation, 24/7
Office: 333 City Blvd W, Suite 1742, Orange, CA 92868
Parent firm: ALL Trial Lawyers — 11 Southern California offices

## Practice Areas

- [Felony Defense](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/felony-defense/): Comprehensive defense of all California Penal Code felonies filed by the Orange County District Attorney, including violent crimes, property crimes, and Three Strikes cases.
- [DUI Defense](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/dui-defense/): VC §23152 first-offense DUI, VC §23153 felony DUI causing injury, VC §23550 fourth-offense DUI, and DMV Administrative Per Se (APS) hearings. The 10-day DMV rule applies.
- [Drug Crimes](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/drug-crimes/): HS §11351 and §11378 possession for sale, HS §11352 and §11379 sales and transportation, plus Proposition 47 reductions, Proposition 36 treatment, and PC §1000 deferred entry of judgment.
- [Violent Crimes](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/violent-crimes/): PC §245(a)(1) assault with a deadly weapon, PC §273.5 corporal injury on a spouse, PC §211 robbery, PC §422 criminal threats, and strike-prior cases.

## Attorney

- [Mohammad Abuershaid, Founding Attorney](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/attorney-mo/): Former Orange County Public Defender. Juris Doctor from Western Michigan University Cooley Law School. Admitted to practice before the State Bar of California, the United States District Court for the Central District of California, and the Southern District of California. Super Lawyers honoree 2020–2025 and Rising Star 2026 (Thomson Reuters).

## Reference Pages

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/faq/): Answers to common Orange County felony defense questions with citations to controlling California statutes (Penal Code §17, §825, §1385, §1170.18, Vehicle Code §23152, §23153, §13353.2, Health & Safety Code §11350, §11351, §11377) and case law (*People v. Superior Court (Romero)* (1996) 13 Cal.4th 497; *In re Humphrey* (2021) 11 Cal.5th 135).
- [Contact](https://orangecountyfelonylawyer.com/contact/): Free consultation intake form and direct phone line. Languages: English and Spanish.

## Courthouses Served

- Central Justice Center, 700 Civic Center Dr W, Santa Ana, CA 92701
- Harbor Justice Center, 4601 Jamboree Rd, Newport Beach, CA 92660
- North Justice Center, 1275 N Berkeley Ave, Fullerton, CA 92832
- West Justice Center, 8141 13th St, Westminster, CA 92683
- Santa Ana Driver Safety Office (DMV), 1737 E Wilshire Ave, Ste A, Santa Ana, CA 92705
